title: VimFu — gp gP Put and Move
description: gp and gP paste like p and P, but leave the cursor after the pasted text instead of on it. Great for sequential pastes.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

setup.content:
# Task List
tasks = [
    "fix login bug",
    "add dark mode",
    "write tests",
]

priority = [
    "deploy hotfix",
]

steps.say: G P pastes like P, but leaves the cursor after the pasted text. Normal P leaves the cursor on the pasted text. G P moves past it.

steps.comment: --- Demo 1: yank a line, paste with p vs gp ---

steps.say: Yank line three. The fix login bug task.
The cursor is on the pasted line. Undo.
Now G P. Paste below, but cursor moves after.
The pasted line is above, and the cursor is on the next line. Ready to keep pasting.
Where G P shines. Paste the same line three times. G P, dot, dot.
Three copies, stacked in order. With normal P you'd paste on top of each other.
G P. Paste and move past. G capital P pastes above and moves past. Use them when you need to paste repeatedly.
